title: The Control of Essential Commodities (Extension to the Chittagong Hill-Tracts) Ordinance, 1970 (East Pakistan Ordinance)
title_en: The Control of Essential Commodities (Extension to the Chittagong Hill-Tracts) Ordinance, 1970 (East Pakistan Ordinance)
description: An Ordinance to extend the provisions of the [* * *] Control of Essential Commodities Act, 1956, to the district of Chittagong Hill-tracts. WHEREAS it is expedient to extend the provisions of the [* * *] Control of Essential Commodities Act, 1956, to the district of Chittagong Hill-tracts; NOW, THEREFORE, in pursuance of the Proclamation of the 25th day of March, 1969, read with the Provisional Constitution Order,...

provisions.title: 1. Short title and commencement
provisions.content:
1. (1) This Ordinance may be called the [* * *] Control of Essential Commodities (Extension to the Chittagong Hill-Tracts) Ordinance, 1970.
(2) It shall come into force at once.

provisions.title: 2. Application of E.P. Act I of 1956 to the Chittagong Hill-tracts
provisions.content: 2. The [* * *] Control of Essential Commodities Act, 1956, shall apply to the district of Chittagong Hill-tracts.
